extract: Dugtrio (Japanese: ダグトリオ Dugtrio) is a Ground-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Diglett starting at level 26. In Alola, Dugtrio has a dual-type Ground/Steel regional form. It evolves from Alolan Diglett starting at level 26. It bears a close resemblance to Wugtrio; however, the two are separate species.
